analysis_result: DATA_UNAVAILABLE: Supplementary Figure 14 xenograft table is not present in the provided data directory. The source data file (MOESM10) contains only Fig 1-5 sheets, and the other MOESM files (MOESM4 Clinical Data; MOESM5 Supplementary Table 2; MOESM6 Sheet1; MOESM7 Sheet1; MOESM8 Supplementary Table 4) do not contain a xenograft/HSC1λ NF1-/- tumor-formation table. No data source for Supplementary Figure 14 is available.
denominator_used: N/A - underlying xenograft table not available in data_dir
assumptions_made: Only files within data_dir were consulted per blinding contract; MOESM10 is explicitly labeled as Fig 1-5 only; sheet names of MOESM4-8 do not indicate xenograft data; no CSV/TSV or other tabular file for Supplementary Figure 14 present.
step_by_step_analysis:
A. DATA INVENTORY: Data directory contains 41467_2023_38432_MOESM4_ESM.xlsx through MOESM10_ESM.xlsx, plus methylation IDATs (GSE207207), 10x snRNA-seq data (GSE207399), and RNA-seq matrix (GSE207400).

B. SHEET ENUMERATION: MOESM10 sheets = [Fig 1b, Fig 1f+g, Fig 3c, Fig 3f, Fig 5a, Fig 5b, Fig 5d, Fig 5e, Fig 5g, Fig 5h, Fig 5i, Fig 5j, Fig 5l] - only Fig 1-5 as noted in the question context. MOESM4 = 'Clinical Data'; MOESM5 = 'Supplementary Table 2'; MOESM6/7 = 'Sheet1'; MOESM8 = 'Supplementary Table 4'. None correspond to a Supplementary Figure 14 xenograft table.

C. COMPUTATION: No computation performed because the relevant source data (xenograft tumor formation counts for HSC1λ NF1-/- cells injected into NRG mice) is not present in any file within data_dir.

D. RESULT: DATA_UNAVAILABLE.
